name: T3-WF-1 emit gate
description: One agent that must call a required invocation, then emit a strict-schema output. Version-pinned tier-3 fixture (specs/developing/testing/scenarios.md#T3-WF-1) — proves structured-output re-ask + required-tool gate.

steps.label: Gather via the required tool
steps.prompt: Research {{inputs.topic}}. You MUST call the record_lookup function invocation exactly once before you continue — the step will not advance until you do.

steps.label: Emit the strict verdict
steps.name: verdict
steps.prompt: Return your verdict for {{inputs.topic}}. It MUST validate against the schema: a category enum, a confidence number between 0 and 1, and a one-sentence summary.
